lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Who defeated the Israelites in battle?
What did the Israelites bring to the next battle?
What happened in the second battle?
answers: Israel lost, the ark was captured, and Eli and his sons died
God sent angels to fight the Philistines

questions.text: What happened in the temple of Dagon?
answers: God knocked the statue down twice and it broke
The Ark of the Covenant disappeared

questions.text: What happened to the people in Ashdod, the first city where the ark was taken?
answers: God sent fire from the sky

questions.text: What happened to the people in Gath, the second city?
answers: They had painful lumps and great panic
They broke the Ark into pieces

questions.text: What happened to the people of Ekron, the third city?
answers: They had painful lumps, panic, rats, and death
They buried the ark in a pit

questions.text: Besides the ark, what did the Philistines send back to Israel?
How did the Philistines test if God was punishing them?
answers: They put the ark on a cart with cows — they took it to Israel, it was from God
They asked their priests to pray to Dagon
They waited for a rainbow to appear in the sky
They splashed water onto the Ark

questions.text: What was the result of the Philistines’ test?
answers: God made the cows pull the cart straight to Israel
The cows ran back to their calves
Angels rode on the backs of the cows
